en.text: or ; (1 Kings 17:1), from H3427; a dweller (but not outlandish (H5237)); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of H3427) and a temporary inmate (H1616) or mere lodger (H3885)) resident alien

senses.gloss_en: or ; (1 Kings 17:1), from H3427; a dweller (but not outlandish (H5237)); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of H3427) and a temporary inmate (H1616) or mere lodger (H3885)) resident alien
